selectedTaskTitle: Review agent role — a dedicated loop mode that audits code quality and proposes backlog tasks rather than making changes
progressNote: Implemented the missing review-agent anomaly handling so review-only runs that modify relevant workspace/source files now fail git-diff verification, surface explicit anomaly warnings, and no longer count those edits as progress. Added integration coverage and documented the workflow behavior.
humanSummary: T38 (Review agent role — a dedicated loop mode that audits code quality and proposes backlog tasks rather than making changes) stopped with control_plane_reload_required. Implemented the missing review-agent anomaly handling so review-only runs that modify relevant workspace/source files now fail git-diff verification, surface explicit anomaly warnings, and no longer count those edits as progress.
